pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Applied Analytics & BI is a primary or secondary domain for the VP Data Products. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (vp).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Applied Analytics & BI), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.416). External validation of this knowledge KSA for the VP Data Products role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Gartner analytics maturity model and BI leadership surveys confirm applied analytics and BI competencies for analytics leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Applied Analytics & BI for the VP Data Products is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Applied Analytics & BI knowledge KSA is within scope for the VP Data Products at the vp tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
